settings.fit_note: Our model is 5'9.5", wears size S top and size S bottom.
settings.care_instructions: Rinse thoroughly in cold water after each use and dry flat or hang in the shade. Hand wash only with a small amount of mild detergent. Do not machine wash, tumble dry, bleach, iron, or dry clean.
settings.shipping_info: Free shipping on orders over $250. Flat rate $7 for domestic Thailand orders. International orders ship via DHL or UPS express from Thailand. Returns are not accepted on sale items.
settings.sp_review_text: "The most flattering bikini I've ever owned. Wore it every day in Koh Samui — the fit is perfect and the fabric holds up beautifully."
